note: CONFIRMED #6121 (rocicorp/mono d4f33d6a6, lands AFTER the @rocicorp/zero 1.7.0 harness pin). A start cursor anchored on a NULL-sorted row returns EMPTY on the stock zero-cache 1.7.0 reference: server-side sqlite table-source compiles `col > NULL` (SQL NULL, matches nothing), so the forward continuation through the NULL group came back empty. Found by the metamorphic startSuffix relation on a SINGLE target (no oracle). The stock-vs-orez differential MISSES this because the sweep generator has no nullable-column start-cursor axis; had it emitted one, stock ([]) and orez-local (47 rows) would DIVERGE and the differential would also flag it. orez-local PASSES this shape (it ships full snapshots and materializes client-side, so it never pushes the start into the buggy sqlite fetch). NON-GATING; --replay exits 1 (REPRODUCED) while the gap is present, and flips to a mismatch (exit 2, re-capture) once the pin advances past mono d4f33d6a6.
invariant: materialize(spec).rows must equal materialize(reference).rows sliced strictly after the row with id 't1' (exclusive start). t1 is the first NULL-dueAt row (NULLs sort first ascending) at index 0, so the correct result is the remaining 47-row ordered suffix (t10, t12, t13, t15, t26, ...).
sourcesNote: Sources are regenerated deterministically from harness/src/fixture-data.ts SEED (seed=1). --replay recomputes the SEED fingerprint and fails loud (exit 2) if it changed, so the repro can never silently reinterpret against different data.
replay: cd harness && mise x node@22 -- bun src/metamorphic-lane.ts --replay regressions/known-gap-zql-6121-null-start-cursor.json --against stock-zero

exitSemantics.1: REPRODUCED — the recorded known product failure still holds (non-gating; NOT dressed green). This is the current expected result on the 1.7.0 pin.
exitSemantics.0: recorded pass still holds (only for expectOutcome=pass fixtures).
exitSemantics.2: corrupt/inapplicable fixture, target mismatch, SEED fingerprint mismatch, row-count drift, or the recorded outcome no longer holds (e.g. upstream fixed it) — re-capture the record.

prerequisites: run under a supported Node so the spawned zero-cache loads @rocicorp/zero-sqlite3 (engines: Node 22.x/24.x, not 25.x): `mise x node@22 -- ...`

install deps under that Node once — `mise x node@22 -- bun install` (a frozen install works too) provides the packaged/prebuilt zero-sqlite3 binding automatically; no manual node-gyp build is required
embedded-postgres darwin/linux dylib sonames are recreated automatically at boot by harness/src/targets/stock-zero.ts (no manual step)
verified fresh-environment on 2026-07-11 (independently by the reviewer too): the exact command reproduced the empty result deterministically (exit 1)
upstreamFix: rocicorp/mono d4f33d6a6 (#6121) — compile NULL cursor bounds into null-safe start constraints
orezRustCoverage: crates/sync-core/tests/query_ast.rs::start_cursor_null_ordering — Orez's Rust server compiler already handles NULL cursors correctly (server-side); this gap is the stock 1.7 reference path, not Orez's own engine.
